So for example, if you go back to the matchmaking service category, one of the mindset issues that makes somebody a better client prospect than another is that they are a professional who get paid for providing expert professional service. They're more prone to accept the idea of an expert professional doing that for them than somebody who is not in that business themselves. So psychographic issues have to do with how your whales think.
